company.name: Sanofi S.A.
company.subtitle: €43.6B 2025 (+10% CER) | Dupixent €15.7B (>30% rev) | Genzyme rare disease | Vaccines #1 flu globally | Tolebrutinib EU approval Apr 2026
company.cashRunway: Self-funding (€10B+ FCF; €5B buyback program; Opella divestment €10.7B Apr 2025)

market.notes: Original indication 2017. Adult + adolescent + pediatric down to 6mo. Largest Dupixent indication ~45% of brand. Class: Adbry (tralokinumab Leo), Cibinqo (Pfizer JAK), Rinvoq (AbbVie JAK).
Approved 2018. Severe eosinophilic + Type 2 high asthma. ~$3.5B 2025 portion.
Approved 2019. ~$1.5B portion.
Approved 2022. Adult + adolescent + pediatric. ~$800M portion.
Approved 2022. ~$700M portion.
Approved 2024 for eosinophilic COPD (first biologic in COPD). ~$700M ramp 2025; peak forecast $3-5B.

us.reachPct.note: Dupixent eosinophilic COPD ~4% reach by peak (eosinophilic subset of severe COPD).

market.notes: Approved 2025 for CSU. New indication; ramp early. Class peer: Xolair (Roche omalizumab).

us.reachPct.note: Dupixent CSU early ramp; Xolair incumbent.

assets.name: Influenza vaccine franchise (Fluzone HD + Flublok + Vaxigrip)

market.notes: Sanofi #1 globally in flu vaccines. Fluzone HD (high-dose, 65+), Flublok (recombinant), Vaxigrip Quadrivalent. ~$3.5B 2025 (declining 2024-25 on US softness + German tender). Class peers: GSK Fluarix, CSL Seqirus Afluria/Flucelvax, Moderna mRNA-1010 Ph3.

us.reachPct.note: Sanofi ~22% US flu vaccine market share (Fluzone HD 65+ dominant).

us.wtpPct.note: 35% -- ACIP routine 65+; commercial covers all adults.

market.notes: RSV mAb peds prophylaxis. ~$1.78B 2025 (+9.5%). 50/50 with AZ. Class peer: Enflonsia (Merck clesrovimab approved Jun 2025).

us.reachPct.note: Beyfortus ~35% US peds RSV cohort dominant; Sanofi books 50%.

market.notes: Adacel (Sanofi Tdap booster), DAPTACEL/Pediacel peds DTaP. ~$600M 2025.

us.reachPct.note: Sanofi ~30% US pertussis vaccine; competes with GSK Boostrix.

market.notes: Sanofi Pentacel + IPOL (IPV) + ActHIB. ~$700M 2025.
Anti-CD38 mAb. IMROZ 1L + ICARIA-MM 2L+. Class leader: Darzalex (J&J, $13B). Sarclisa share growing on 1L combo.

us.reachPct.note: Sarclisa ~5% myeloma pool; Darzalex incumbent dominant.

market.notes: Long-acting Factor VIII fusion (Bioverativ acquisition 2018). XTEND-1 Ph3 once-weekly. Sobi 50/50. Class peer: Hemlibra (Roche), Mim8 (Novo BLA).

us.reachPct.note: ALTUVIIIO ~6% of US hemophilia A pool (Hemlibra incumbent dominant).

market.notes: Anti-CD3 mAb. Approved 2022 to delay T1D onset in Stage 2 (autoantibody+, normoglycemic). 14-day infusion course. ~$300M 2025 ramping.

us.reachPct.note: Tzield ~2% peak T1D early-detection pool (~50K Stage 2 US).

market.notes: Selective ROCK2 oral inhibitor. 3L+ cGVHD post failure of 2 prior therapies. Approved 2021. Class: Imbruvica (BTK), Jakafi (JAK), Niktimvo (axatilimab Incyte).
Anti-vWF Nanobody (Ablynx legacy). Acute aTTP combined with plasma exchange + immunosuppression. ~$300M 2025.
Teriflunomide DHODH inhibitor. LOE 2023 -- generic teriflunomide eroded sharply. Q3 2025 €49M (-44.6%). Tail product.

assets.name: Genzyme rare disease (Cerezyme + Fabrazyme + Pompe + Aldurazyme + Xenpozyme)

market.notes: Cerezyme ERT + Cerdelga oral SRT. ~$700M 2025. Mature franchise; biosimilar pressure on ERT.

us.reachPct.note: Sanofi Gaucher ~50% US share (Takeda VPRIV competitor).

market.notes: Fabrazyme ERT for Fabry. ~$600M 2025. Class peer: Galafold (Amicus oral chaperone), Replagal (Takeda; not US).
Myozyme/Lumizyme legacy + Nexviazyme/Nexviadyme next-gen growing. ~$1B 2025. Class peer: Pombiliti+Opfolda (Amicus next-gen).
Aldurazyme ERT for MPS I. ~$300M 2025. Co-promote with BioMarin.
Xenpozyme ERT for ASMD (Niemann-Pick A/B). Approved 2022. Sole approved option. ~$200M 2025.

us.reachPct.note: Xenpozyme sole approved ASMD therapy ~50% reach.

market.notes: CXCR4 antagonist for HSC mobilization in autologous transplant (myeloma, NHL). ~$350M 2025. Niche specialty. Genzyme legacy.

assets.name: General Medicines (Lantus + Toujeo + Plavix + Lovenox legacy)

market.notes: Insulin therapy for T1D (~25% of insulin franchise globally; T1D pts mandatory life-long insulin). Split from SNY insulin insulin franchise.

us.reachPct.note: Insulin US T1D pop ~1.9M, branded share captured.

us.priceK.note: Insulin priceK retained at insulin franchise level.

market.notes: Insulin therapy for advanced T2D requiring insulin (~75% of insulin franchise globally). Split from SNY insulin insulin franchise.

assets.name: Eloctate (Hem A) + Alprolix (Hem B) -- w/ Sobi (legacy hemophilia)
assets.stage: Commercial (~$700M 2025; declining as ALTUVIIIO succeeds Eloctate)

market.notes: Recombinant Factor VIII-Fc fusion (Bioverativ legacy 2018). Declining as ALTUVIIIO next-gen succeeds. ~$400M 2025.

us.reachPct.note: Eloctate ~4% Hem A pool declining vs ALTUVIIIO.

market.notes: Recombinant Factor IX-Fc fusion. ~$300M 2025. Class peer: BeneFIX (Pfizer), Idelvion (CSL), Rebinyn (Novo). Hemgenix gene therapy emerging.
PCSK9 mAb. ~$300M Sanofi share (Regeneron 50/50). Class peer: Repatha (Amgen evolocumab dominant ~$2B). PCSK9 mAb class small relative to oral pipeline.

MenACWY conjugate vaccine (Menactra legacy + Menquadfi next-gen). ACIP routine 11-12+booster 16 + at-risk adult. Class peers: Menveo (GSK), Nimenrix (Pfizer). Pentavalent Penbraya (Pfizer ABCWY) emerging competitor.

us.reachPct.note: Sanofi Menactra+Menquadfi ~25% US meningococcal MenACWY pool.

market.notes: Non-absorbed phosphate binder polymer for dialysis pts. ~$200M 2025 (declining; sevelamer LOE'd, generic pressure). Class peer: Velphoro (Vifor sucroferric oxyhydroxide), Auryxia (Akebia ferric citrate).

us.reachPct.note: Renvela ~4% US ESRD phosphate binder; declining.

market.notes: Irbesartan ARB + Avalide/CoAprovel HCTZ combo. Off-patent globally; Sanofi maintains EM/Asia branded share. ~$700M 2025.

row.reachPct.note: 1.5% -- China + EM where generic substitution slower.

market.notes: Lovenox LMWH (~$700M, mostly EM branded post US LOE 2010) + Plavix P2Y12 (~$500M, almost entirely EM/Asia branded). Mature legacy.

us.reachPct.note: Lovenox+Plavix branded ~0.2% post-LOE; mostly EM volume.

assets.name: Heritage CV/CNS legacy bundle (Multaq + Maxalt + small)

market.notes: Dronedarone class III antiarrhythmic for paroxysmal/persistent AF rhythm control. Approved 2009; mature ~$200M.

indications.name: Heritage misc tail (Maxalt + Auvi-Q + various legacy CV/CNS/anti-infective)

market.notes: Heritage tail: Maxalt (rizatriptan migraine ~$100M, generic), Auvi-Q (epinephrine auto-injector ~$200M), broader EM/heritage portfolio across CV/CNS/anti-infective + alliance true-ups. ~$1.8B 2025 to reconcile EUR 43.6B total revenue. True heterogeneous tail tagged as pseudo-area.

assets.name: Tolebrutinib (Cenrifki, BTK CNS-penetrant) — MS
assets.stage: EU CHMP positive Apr 2026 (Cenrifki SPMS); US CRL on nrSPMS

market.notes: CNS-penetrant BTK. HERCULES Ph3 nrSPMS positive (31% CDP reduction). GEMINI 1/2 missed primary in relapsing MS. PERSEUS missed in PPMS. EU CHMP positive Apr 24 2026 as Cenrifki for SPMS without relapses. FDA issued CRL. Peak forecast $2-4B if EU label expands + US strategy reset.

us.reachPct.note: Tolebrutinib US CRL limits launch; EU primary market.

market.notes: Anti-OX40L mAb. Q4W/Q12W dosing differentiation. COAST 1+2 + SHORE Ph3 positive. AQUA + ESTUARY readouts through 2026. Leerink: efficacy below Dupixent. Peak forecast $1-3B.
Anti-CD40L mAb (newer than ruplizumab failed). FREXALT relapsing MS + FREVIVA nrSPMS Ph3. Readouts 2026-27. Peak forecast $2-4B if MS class expansion succeeds.
Anti-C1s mAb. MOBILIZE (refractory CIDP) + VITALIZE (IVIg residual) Ph3. Readouts 2026-27. Class peer: Vyvgart Hytrulo (Argenx FcRn). Peak forecast $1-2B.

assets.name: Itepekimab (anti-IL-33) — w/ Regeneron 50/50
assets.stage: Mixed Phase 3 (AERIFY-1 hit, AERIFY-2 miss, May 2025)

market.notes: Anti-IL-33 mAb. AERIFY-1 met primary in former-smoker COPD (-27% exacerbations); AERIFY-2 missed. Mixed -- regulatory dialogue ongoing. May launch with restricted label.

us.reachPct.note: Itepekimab ~1.5% COPD if approved with restricted label.

mega_bear.narrative: Dupixent slows + Genzyme biosimilars + tolebrutinib US never recovers + LSDs erode
events: X Dupixent growth flatlines as Argenx + amlitelimab + others compete
X Tolebrutinib US CRL stays unresolved
X Itepekimab COPD restricted label limits ramp
X Frexalimab/amlitelimab Ph3 wins muted post-Dupixent

bear.narrative: Dupixent grows but slowly + select pipeline wins + Genzyme stable
events: ~ Amlitelimab launches but takes <10% AD share

base.narrative: Dupixent reaches €20B+ + Genzyme stable + new pipeline launches deliver
events: V CagriSema (no, that's Novo) -- Tolebrutinib EU launch + select markets
V Genzyme rare disease franchise stable +5%/yr

bull.narrative: Dupixent €25B+ + multiple pipeline wins + Genzyme growth + China rebounds
events: V LSD franchise grows with Pompe + ASMD

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Dupixent €30B+ multi-indication monster + tolebrutinib MS class leader + transformative pipeline
events: V Dupixent reaches €30B+ as adult+peds expansion accelerates
V Tolebrutinib MS class-leading $5B+ post-FDA reset
V Frexalimab + amlitelimab combined autoimmune franchise $5B+
V Genzyme franchise grows on Nexviazyme + Xenpozyme expansion
V Multiple expansion to peak premium pharma multiples

lastData.title: FY2025 €43.6B (+10% CER); Dupixent €15.7B; 2026 Q1 +13.6% CER
points: FY2025 revenue €43.6B (+10% CER); Business EPS +15% CER
Dupixent €15.7B (+25%) -- 30%+ of revenue, growing across 7 indications
Q1 2026: sales +13.6% CER, Business EPS €1.88 (+14% CER)
Tolebrutinib EU CHMP positive Apr 24 2026 (Cenrifki SPMS); FDA CRL US
Itepekimab AERIFY-1 hit / AERIFY-2 missed COPD
Opella divestment closed Apr 30 2025 (€10.7B net proceeds)
2026 guide: high single-digit sales growth, EPS slightly faster

nextCatalyst.title: Tolebrutinib EU launch + amlitelimab AQUA/ESTUARY readouts + frexalimab MS Ph3
thresholds: Apr 2026: Tolebrutinib EU CHMP positive Cenrifki -- approval imminent
H1-H2 2026: Amlitelimab AQUA + ESTUARY Ph3 readouts (AD)
2026: Frexalimab FREXALT (relapsing MS) + FREVIVA (nrSPMS) Ph3 readouts
2026-27: Riliprubart MOBILIZE + VITALIZE CIDP Ph3 readouts
2026: Beyfortus second RSV season + label expansion
2026-27: Dupixent additional label expansions (CSU growth, BP, others)

risks: Dupixent dependency: >30% of revenue, but composition patent into early 2030s -- biggest moat. Risk: cannibalization by next-gen IL-13 (Lilly lebrikizumab), JAK (Rinvoq, Cibinqo)
Tolebrutinib US FDA CRL on nrSPMS NDA -- requires regulatory reset; PERSEUS PPMS missed
Vaccine pricing pressure (German tender flu 2025; US flu vaccination softness)
Genzyme rare disease biosimilar pressure (Cerezyme/Fabrazyme older entries)
Aubagio MS LOE 2023 ongoing decline (-45% YoY)
Amlitelimab efficacy 'meaningfully inferior to Dupixent' per Leerink -- adoption concern
Itepekimab AERIFY-2 miss limits COPD launch trajectory
Beyfortus competition (Merck Enflonsia Jun 2025 launched RSV peds)
Multiple alliance economics: Dupixent (REGN 50/50), Beyfortus (AZ 50/50), Itepekimab (REGN 50/50), ALTUVIIIO (Sobi)
China growth dependency post anti-corruption normalization

catalysts.title: Tolebrutinib EU approval (Cenrifki, SPMS without relapses)
catalysts._rationale: CHMP positive opinion Apr 24 2026; EC formal approval typically 2-3 months.

catalysts.title: Amlitelimab AQUA + ESTUARY Ph3 final readouts (AD)
catalysts._rationale: OCEANA program COAST 1+2+SHORE positive; AQUA + ESTUARY through 2026 per Sanofi.

catalysts.title: Frexalimab FREXALT + FREVIVA Ph3 readouts (MS)
catalysts._rationale: Ph3 enrolling per Sanofi pipeline; readouts 2026-27.

catalysts.title: Riliprubart MOBILIZE + VITALIZE Ph3 (CIDP)
catalysts._rationale: MOBILIZE refractory + VITALIZE IVIg-residual Ph3 ongoing; 2026-27 readouts.
